title: Reference Breakdown Contract
description: Decomposition card produced by the visual-reference structure pipeline. See docs/ai-kb/20_visual_reference_structure_pipeline.md and the visual-reference-structure-pipeline capability spec.

source_facts.description: Source facts preserved verbatim from the candidate manifest. The breakdown SHALL NOT upgrade or downgrade usage_decision.

observations.description: Raw observed cues before classification. Each observation carries an evidence pointer back to the source material.

direct_component.description: Reusable bounded prefab or NBT candidate. Each non-empty entry SHALL carry a downstream_route.

atomic_component.description: Small reusable form/motif/roof/wall/bridge/gate operation. Each non-empty entry SHALL carry a downstream_route.

generative_grammar.description: Planner/layout/routing/proportion rule. Each non-empty entry SHALL carry a downstream_route.

calibration_only.description: Visual judgment reference, not an asset or rule. Entries carry a visual_question and SHALL NOT declare a prefab/form/planner route.

verdict_state.description: Human verdict, recorded separately from task pass/fail status.
